svg.text: React SPA → Caddy / nginx → Express API → Agent Orchestrator → Qwen (Model Studio) + MongoDB.
Two-tier long-term memory — a canonical-key TRIE for exact, overwriteable facts + a vector store for fuzzy recall — shop-scoped and shared across every chat session.
MemoryAgent · two-tier long-term memory (shop-scoped · shared across all chat sessions)
TIER 1 · Structured facts — canonical-key TRIE · exact lookup · prefix query · instant overwrite (facts.ts · trie.ts)
TIER 2 · Narrative memory — vector store · scored recall + MMR under a token budget · reinforce · forget (memory.ts)
facts — key · value · history · TRIE source of truth
